winner.message: Bounding box must be numeric W/E/S/N
Metadata record date must be YYYY-MM-DD or datetime-local
Catalog mode: enter parent project on Mission (aggregation) or Distribution (parent project)
Publication date must be YYYY-MM-DD or datetime-local
Related data URL must be http(s)
Catalog mode: add structured UxS operational ID/name for the selected layer instead of only title or abstract text
Catalog mode: confirm what operational layer this UxS record primarily describes
Catalog mode: run, sortie, and dive records should include the parent run/deployment identifier when available
At least one sensor is required
winner.notes: Per active sensor row: type, modelId/sensorId, variable; optional GCMD alignment warning.
One error row per empty GCMD facet (sciencekeywords, datacenters, …).

winner.message: Positional accuracy value must be numeric
Strict mode: grid column size and row size are required when grid representation is enabled
Trajectory sampling is required when trajectory is enabled
Vertical CRS URL must be http(s)
Landing page URL must be http(s)
Metadata landing URL must be http(s)
NCEI distributor contact href must be http(s)
NCEI metadata contact href must be http(s)
Catalog mode: enter parent project on Mission (aggregation) or Distribution (parent project)
Catalog mode: publication reference is required
